title: krazo #2896
definition:
1) to croak
    1a) of the cry of a raven
    1b) hence, to cry out, cry aloud, vociferate
    1c) to cry or pray for vengeance
 2) to cry
    2a) cry out aloud, speak with a loud voice

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5823\\
